name: proto-me
description: A product prototype exploration tool for Codex that moves ideas toward executable implementation through structured discovery, planning, optional visual design, and agent-driven execution.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into executable prototypes through structured exploration, planning, and agent generation.
interface.longDescription: Proto-me is a product prototype exploration tool for Codex that turns rough ideas into executable implementations. Explore project context, clarify product direction through structured Q&A, generate optional visual designs, and produce durable agent files for execution — all within the active project workspace.
defaultPrompt: Use $proto-me to help me prototype a new feature.
Use $proto-plan to generate the prototype agent from the current brief.
Use $proto-image-gen to generate a UI concept for this prototype.
